description: Provenance record for an artifact — captures source, transformation chain, and attribution as a traversable graph. Owned by Atlas.

artifact_id.description: Root artifact this provenance record describes.

source.description: Origin of the artifact: URL, upload, agent invocation, or another artifact reference.

chain.description: Ordered list of transform steps that produced this artifact from its source.

attribution.description: Agent or user IDs credited as contributors.
